raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "There is currently a lag time from when entities hire lobbyists and when the public and media are alerted to these lobbying activities.",
    "The proposed measure will streamline and open up the lobbying registration process.",
    "Transparency is critical to making sure the law-making process is open and fair to all.",
    "Senate Bill 305 amends the Political Reform Act of 1974 to allow electronic signatures on registration documents from lobbyists.",
    "Currently, a live signature is required on registration forms filed in-person or sent through the mail.",
    "The delay in documents allows lobbying activities to occur before the public and media are aware of registered lobbyists.",
    "SB 305 will significantly reduce the delay of posting lobbying filings online by allowing electronic submission."
  ]
}
```
